prompt: Serene golden-hour portrait of a young woman sitting in a sunlit meadow of white daisies, eyes gently closed, face tilted toward warm sunlight, long wavy dark hair with daisies tucked behind her ear, wearing an ivory cable-knit cardigan over a flowing cream dress; vertical composition, subject slightly off-center following the rule of thirds, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh in the foreground daisies, crisply detailed midground figure, distant rolling hills and a small cottage softly rendered in the background. Warm sepia-tinged color palette: soft creams, muted sage greens, pale yellows and honey light; rim lighting and subtle volumetric sun rays, delicate lens flare and soft film grain. Painterly anime-realism hybrid: ultra-detailed facial features, realistic hair strands, textured fabric stitches, intricate daisy petals, gentle brushwork for landscape, cinematic soft contrast, dreamy nostalgic mood, 35–50mm focal feel, wide aperture shallow focus, high-resolution, finely detailed atmosphere.
